Sorasaki Hina (空崎ヒナ, Sorasaki Hina) is one of the students studying at Gehenna Academy who wields a Machine Gun.

She is the leader of the Disciplinary Committee.

She is a 3rd year student and the current chairwoman of Gehenna's Prefect Team, who is rightfully feared by every student in the academy, if not all of Kivotos.

At heart, she is a troublesome, laid-back person, who calls it a "hassle" whenever she talks about school rules. However, said person becomes strict at the academy, and enacts calm and quick judgment without hesitation on the battlefield.

Her fighting prowess is astounding and for that reason, any organization that opposes Gehenna is more afraid of her than anyone else from the Prefect Team.

Although shown to seem rather cold and distant on the outside, Hina is shown to be a very relaxed and soft person when she's allowed to express herself, despite her title as the head of the Prefect Team. She is always busy with work and considers many of her tasks as bothersome, if not understandably, stressfully exhausting.

She has knee-length, wavy, white hair tied with a black and red ribbon, with outstretched dark black horns that have glowing purple cracks. A golden clip with a monocle attached to it adorns her bangs. She has purple devil eyes and long black wings coming from the back of her waist.

H
